channel.title: Lobster on Charlotte's AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Lobster on Charlotte's AI Lab

item.title: 20 Things OpenClaw Can Do for You (With Real Examples)
item.description: Not theoretical. Not hypothetical. 20 real-world use cases that people actually run every day. Read this and decide if the lobster is worth raising.

item.title: How Much Does It Cost to Raise a Lobster? 3 Budget Plans Revealed
item.description: From free to a few hundred bucks a month — three transparent budget tiers. Plus my actual 3-month bill.

item.title: What Even Is OpenClaw? A 3-Minute Guide to the AI Lobster
item.description: An AI lobster with a WeChat Index of 71 million. What does it actually do? Here’s the breakdown from someone who’s been using it for 3 months.
